name: Parmesan Herb Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C).
2. Grease the bottoms of 12 muffin pan cups, or line with paper baking cups.
3. Sift flour into a measuring cup and level off.
4. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, crumbled sage leaves, chopped fresh parsley, and grated Parmesan cheese; blend well.
5. Add butter/sour milk mixture and egg; stir until just combined.
6. Fill prepared muffin cups 2/3 full with batter.
7. Bake at 400 degrees F for 15 to 20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Serve hot.
Microwave Directions:
1. Prepare muffin batter as directed above.
2. Using a 6-cup microwave-safe muffin pan, line each cup with 2 paper baking cups to absorb moisture during baking.
3. Fill lined cups about half full with batter.
4. Sprinkle the top of each muffin with cornflake crumbs.
5. Microwave on HIGH for 2 1/2 to 3 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, rotating the pan halfway through baking.
6. Remove muffins from the pan and discard the outer paper cups.
7. Cool 1 minute on a wire rack before serving. Repeat with remaining batter.
